metadata.name: Manage Pyrotechnics Permit for an Event

description: A touring show plans to use pyrotechnics, and the event manager must secure a permit from the local fire department.

nodes.task_description: Obtain the detailed pyrotechnics plan from the tour's production manager.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent receives the plan, including the types of effects and their locations.

nodes.task_description: Complete the permit application for the local fire department.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent fills out the required application form.

nodes.task_description: Submit the application and the pyrotechnics plan to the fire marshal.
Schedule an on-site inspection with the fire marshal for the day of the show.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent coordinates the final inspection to get the permit signed off.
